basic_details.job_title: SAGES Durg – Lab Assistant, Assistant Teacher and More – 227 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Atmanand Utkrisht English Medium School Management Committee, District-Durg
basic_details.post_name: Lecturer, Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Physical Education Teacher, Computer Teacher, Lab Assistant, Librarian
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via https://cgssa.in/sagesdurg/sagesdurg and durg.gov.in
basic_details.short_information: SAGES Durg has published the Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 227 Lab Assistant, Assistant Teacher and More Vacancies. Apply online by June 08. Salary ₹22,400-38,100. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

selection_process: Merit-based (based on educational qualification marks); no written/oral test
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Applications submitted by speed post, ordinary post, or any other offline medium are not valid and will not be considered. Candidates must apply only via the official online portal. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date.
seo_tags: SAGES Durg Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 227 Lab Assistant, Assistant Teacher and More Posts
